category_sources: Official README describes Rubber Band Library as an audio time-stretching and pitch-shifting library and utility program.
source_facts.description says it is an audio time stretcher tool and library.
display_name_sources: Official README heading is Rubber Band Library.
Official homepage and API docs use Rubber Band Library.
docs_sources: Official README links the API documentation, integration notes, command help text, and home page as further documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official README identifies https://hg.sr.ht/~breakfastquay/rubberband as the code repository and GitHub as an official mirror.
tags_sources: Official README describes tempo and pitch manipulation and both library and command-line tool components.
source_facts.description identifies audio time stretching and library use.
